description: fond of horses; philippus, the name of four israelites
notes: philip the tetrarch was brother to herod antipas, by the father's, but not by the mother's side. he was born of cleopatra, of jerusalem, and herod of malthace, a samaritan. he died in the twentieth year of tiberias, five years after his mention in luke 3:1. he built caesarea philippi. his step brother herod antipas unlawfully married his wife.
